die-cut-sticker.name: Die-Cut Sticker
die-cut-sticker.blurb: Features thick, premium-grade material designed for durability and vibrant printing.

circle-sticker.name: Round Sticker
circle-sticker.blurb: Printed on thick, premium material with smooth circular edges for a clean finish.

rectangle-sticker.name: Rectangular Sticker
rectangle-sticker.blurb: Durable premium material with sharp edges for clear, professional designs.

square-sticker.name: Square Sticker
square-sticker.blurb: Premium-grade material with crisp edges for balanced and modern designs.

oval-sticker.name: Oval Sticker
oval-sticker.blurb: Printed on durable premium material with smooth curved edges.

rounded-sticker.name: Rounded Square Sticker
rounded-sticker.blurb: Premium material with soft, rounded corners for a polished appearance.

kiss-cut-sticker.name: Kiss Cut Stickers
kiss-cut-sticker.blurb: Precision cut with an easy-peel backing for convenient handling and application.

sticker-sheet.name: Sticker Sheets
sticker-sheet.blurb: Multiple stickers are arranged on a single sheet for easy storage and organization.

clear-sticker.name: Clear Transparent Sticker
clear-sticker.blurb: Printed on transparent material that blends seamlessly with the surface.

hologram-sticker.name: Hologram Stickers
hologram-sticker.blurb: Reflective holographic material that creates eye-catching rainbow effects.

transfer-sticker.name: Transfer Stickers
transfer-sticker.blurb: Premium cutting ensures every detail of your design is sharp and clear. The result is a polished, standout finish that looks like it’s painted directly onto the surface.

vinyl-lettering.name: Vinyl Lettering
vinyl-lettering.blurb: Featuring smooth, precision-cut lettering that creates a clean, polished appearance every time.

custom-lettering.name: Precision-Cut Vinyl Lettering
custom-lettering.blurb: Designed for clean and accurate placement. Once applied, the backing is removed to reveal crisp lettering that blends seamlessly with the surface.

die-cut-roll.name: Die Cut Roll Stickers
die-cut-roll.blurb: Precision die-cut stickers are arranged in a continuous roll for efficient application.

clear-roll.name: Clear Roll Stickers
clear-roll.blurb: Transparent stickers in roll format for quick and organized labeling.

circle-roll.name: Circle Roll Stickers
circle-roll.blurb: Round stickers arranged in a continuous roll for easy dispensing

square-roll.name: Square Roll Stickers
square-roll.blurb: Square stickers supplied in roll format for efficient bulk use.

rectangle-roll.name: Rectangle Roll Stickers
rectangle-roll.blurb: Rectangular stickers organized in a roll for fast labeling and packaging.

rounded-roll.name: Rounded Roll Stickers
rounded-roll.blurb: Rounded square stickers arranged in a roll for convenient application.

oval-roll.name: Oval Roll Stickers
oval-roll.blurb: Oval stickers supplied in roll format for organized, high-volume use.

paper-roll.name: Paper Roll Stickers
paper-roll.blurb: Paper stickers in roll format designed for everyday labeling needs.

die-cut-sheet.name: Die Cut Sticker Sheets
die-cut-sheet.blurb: Custom-shaped stickers neatly arranged on a single sheet.

circle-sheet.name: Circle Sticker Sheets
circle-sheet.blurb: Round stickers are organized on a sheet for easy access and use.

oval-sheet.name: Oval Sticker Sheets
oval-sheet.blurb: Oval stickers arranged on a sheet for organized application.

square-sheet.name: Square Sticker Sheets

rectangle-sheet.name: Rectangle Sticker Sheets
rectangle-sheet.blurb: Rectangular stickers arranged on a sheet for easy labeling.
